"I have conceived an idea most ingenious."

【CHARACTER KEY: 📖🎮】

Bot for the First Kindred, Don Quixote, from Limbus Company! This is somewhat of a scenario where you're also one of the kindreds within his family. Takes place before the creation of La Manchaland.

I just HAD to make this bot when I saw him. idk what to tell you guys, his cringeass juvenile (as sancho would put it) motivations and his wet dogness captivated me. I love that moe old man

i kinda wish we had a different name for him though. i call him alonso (like alonso quijano) since it's a bit hard to differentiate between our don and this don now...
